headline: Why Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Needs Fresh Capital to Support Its AI Server Order Surge
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) is one of the fastest-growing AI infrastructure stocks to buy. On June 11, 2026, Supermicro priced equity and equity-linked financing transactions that, together with a planned at-the-market program, represented a total potential equity raise of $7.0 billion. Super Micro Computer said the capital would help fund component purchases tied to […]
